question_text: Which specific APIs/endpoints are considered 'critical' for RBAC control?

options.D: All APIs with access level > public

answer_text: All mutation APIs (POST/PUT/DELETE) require RBAC control
justification: Defines scope of work and which middleware/decorators need to be implemented

question_text: What is the current RBAC implementation (library or custom solution)?

options.C: Role check in each handler manually
options.D: No RBAC exists, need to build from scratch

answer_text: No RBAC exists, need to build from scratch
justification: Determines architecture of live enforcement integration - extend existing or build new
